# Generated by Codex from vanilla estate privilege definitions.
# Base acceptance scales with the privilege estate-power effect; final acceptance also uses the common estate/crown bargaining factors.

pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights_acceptance = {
	value = 65
	multiply = pie_et_positive_trade_acceptance_factor
	multiply = pie_et_privilege_acceptance_scale
}

pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights_acceptance = {
	value = -101
	multiply = pie_et_negative_trade_acceptance_factor
	multiply = pie_et_privilege_acceptance_scale
}

pie_et_sg_guild_investments_acceptance = {

	multiply = pie_et_positive_trade_acceptance_factor
	multiply = pie_et_privilege_acceptance_scale
}

pie_et_sr_guild_investments_acceptance = {
	value = -78
	multiply = pie_et_negative_trade_acceptance_factor
	multiply = pie_et_privilege_acceptance_scale
}

pie_et_generated_selected_privilege_acceptance = {
	value = 0

	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights } add = pie_et_sg_nobles_land_rights_acceptance } # power 0.75
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights } add = pie_et_sr_nobles_land_rights_acceptance } # power 0.75
	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium } add = pie_et_sg_auxilium_et_consilium_acceptance } # power 0.5

	if = { limit = { has_variable = pie_et_sr_ceremonial_tax_exemptions } add = pie_et_sr_ceremonial_tax_exemptions_acceptance } # power 0.33
